creator: fernape@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Kurt Jaeger from comment #7)

I checked it right now and it's working for me but I think I know what is going on. When it starts, do you see the activate product window? I think you have it in the background so you can not click on anything unless you hit the "Cancel" or "Activate" buttons in that window. Maybe the remote session via ssh is playing tricks with the focus of the windows.

BTW, it is free to get a open source license from the upstream project.
